description: Expert-authored defense rubric for PM engagement quality. LLM-judge uses this in P1; calibrate against CFA panel.

criteria.pass: Agent directly answers the PM's latest challenge with new analysis or cited evidence
criteria.fail: Agent deflects, changes subject, or ignores the PM's specific point

criteria.pass: Defense references specific data from tool outputs (note, table, prior-year amount)
criteria.fail: Defense is assertion-only with no link to retrieved excerpts

criteria.pass: Agent updates adjusted EPS or classification when PM surfaces valid prior-year pattern
criteria.fail: Agent holds initial number despite contradictory evidence in retrieved footnotes

criteria.pass: Each PM turn receives materially new content
criteria.fail: Follow-up C trigger — semantic repetition without new evidence (score 0)

follow_up_c_override.note: Engagement failure regardless of final numeric outcome
